documents.content:
ESP32-WROOM-32 Datasheet
1. OVERVIEW
            The ESP32 is a low-power system on a chip microcontrollers
            with integrated Wi-Fi and dual-mode Bluetooth.
2. SPECIFICATIONS
            Processor: Dual-core Xtensa LX6, up to 240 MHz
            SRAM: 520 KB
            Flash: 4 MB (external)
            WiFi: 802.11 b/g/n
            Bluetooth: BLE 4.2
            GPIO: 34 pins
            Operating Voltage: 2.2V to 3.6V
            Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C

2. SPECIFICATIONS
            Processor: Dual-core Xtensa LX6, up to 240 MHz
            SRAM: 520 KB
            Flash: 4 MB (external)
            WiFi: 802.11 b/g/n
            Bluetooth: BLE 4.2
            GPIO: 34 pins
            Operating Voltage: 2.2V to 3.6V
            Operating Temperature: -40°C to 85°C
3. POWER SPECIFICATIONS
            Supply Voltage: 3.3V
            Current Consumption:
            - WiFi TX: 240 mA (peak)
            - WiFi RX: 95 mA
            - Bluetooth TX: 130 mA
            - Light Sleep: 0.8 mA
            - Deep Sleep: 10 μA

3. POWER SPECIFICATIONS
            Supply Voltage: 3.3V
            Current Consumption:
            - WiFi TX: 240 mA (peak)
            - WiFi RX: 95 mA
            - Bluetooth TX: 130 mA
            - Light Sleep: 0.8 mA
            - Deep Sleep: 10 μA
4. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Number of GPIOs: 34
            Output Current: 40 mA (max per pin)
            Total Current: 400 mA (VDD pins)
            Input Voltage: 0V to 3.3V (5V tolerant with strap)
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 45 kΩ typical

4. GPIO SPECIFICATIONS
            Number of GPIOs: 34
            Output Current: 40 mA (max per pin)
            Total Current: 400 mA (VDD pins)
            Input Voltage: 0V to 3.3V (5V tolerant with strap)
            Pull-up/Pull-down: 45 kΩ typical
5. WiFi SPECIFICATIONS
            Standard: 802.11 b/g/n
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            Channels: 13 (CN), 11 (US)
            TX Power: +20 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -98 dBm

5. WiFi SPECIFICATIONS
            Standard: 802.11 b/g/n
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            Channels: 13 (CN), 11 (US)
            TX Power: +20 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -98 dBm
6. BLUETOOTH SPECIFICATIONS
            Version: BLE 4.2
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            TX Power: +12 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -97 dBm

6. BLUETOOTH SPECIFICATIONS
            Version: BLE 4.2
            Frequency: 2.4 GHz
            TX Power: +12 dBm (max)
            RX Sensitivity: -97 dBm
7. ADC SPECIFICATIONS
            Channels: 18 (2 at 1.8V, 16 at 3.3V)
            Resolution: 12-bit
            Sampling Rate: Up to 2 MSPS
            Reference: VDD (3.3V)
            Accuracy: ±1%
8. DAC SPECIFICATIONS
            Channels: 2
            Resolution: 8-bit
            Output Range: 0 to VDD

8. DAC SPECIFICATIONS
            Channels: 2
            Resolution: 8-bit
            Output Range: 0 to VDD
9. I2C SPECIFICATIONS
            Speed: Up to 400 kHz
            Address Range: 0x00-0x7F
            pins: GPIO21 (SDA), GPIO22 (SCL)
10. SPI SPECIFICATIONS
            Max Speed: 80 MHz
            CS Pins: 6
            Data Width: 1-32 bits
            Mode: 0-3
